title: Benchmarking Reference-Free LLM Agent Robustness Under Schema, Policy, and Toolset Drift: Data and Code Artifact
description: Episode-level evaluation records, full source code, and analysis scripts for a 5-model benchmark measuring LLM agent robustness under three controlled drift families (schema, policy, toolset). Covers the expanded evaluation: 270 reference-free trials per model-condition cell (30 eval scenarios × 3 episodes × 3 drift families) across 5 models and 3 conditions (static, blind-replay, rules-only), plus a normalization-ablation run. All numerical claims in the manuscript can be independently verified offline from the stored episode_records.jsonl files using the included stdlib-only recompute_metrics.py script. Associated manuscript is under peer review.
